summary: Verified PPT bug fixes: Hero video now shows 6 rotating clips, /faq and /testimonials pages load successfully (no longer 404), admin intelligence features/systems APIs return expected data. All 17 backend tests passed.

hero_video.loop_disabled: Yes - allows clip cycling via onEnded
hero_video.details: Hero video component now has 6 clips that rotate on video end

faq_page.details: FAQ page no longer 404, loads with search and expandable accordion items

testimonials_page.details: Testimonials page no longer 404, displays 4 testimonials with ratings and content

public_intelligence_page.details: Public intelligence page loads with features grid and category filter

admin_intelligence_features_api.details: Admin can fetch all intelligence features

admin_control_systems_api.details: Admin can fetch control systems for recommendations

minor.note: Console shows 'Failed to fetch' errors in Playwright due to Cloudflare blocking some API calls from automated browser, but direct curl/pytest requests work fine

issues: Image warning: '/lexa-black.png' has width/height modified but not the other - should add 'width: auto' or 'height: auto'

critical_code_review_comments: HeroCurator.tsx: Correctly implements 6 video clips with onEnded cycling - no loop attribute
faq/page.tsx: Properly fetches FAQs from /api/solutions and /api/services with hardcoded General FAQs
testimonials/page.tsx: Properly fetches from /api/testimonials and handles array response
context_for_next_testing_agent: PPT bug fixes verified: 1) Hero video now has 6 clips that rotate (not black), 2) /faq page loads with 46 FAQs, 3) /testimonials page loads with 4 testimonials, 4) Admin intelligence APIs working. Cloudflare may block Playwright automated login to admin pages but all admin APIs verified via pytest.

bugs_fixed.hero_video_black: FIXED - Added 6 video clips and removed loop attribute to enable clip cycling
bugs_fixed.faq_404: FIXED - Created /app/frontend/app/faq/page.tsx with search and accordion
